content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "NEUTRAL",
    "reasoning": "Indices flat on the session but strong sector rotation playing out — Power, Pharma, and FMCG leading on earnings-driven moves. VIX elevated at 18.67 suggests continued volatility. Book is 79% deployed with limited remaining capacity; focus shifts to managing existing positions and locking in gains on winners while setting stop-losses on every holding (currently none have SLs — critical gap).",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24100,
      "nifty_resistance": 24400
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 74.00,
      "new_target": 88.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Q4 FY26 beat (PAT +35% YoY, NNPA 0.13% best-in-class), PSU bank sector tailwind intact. Position down 3.3% but thesis is solid. Setting SL at 74 (below April 15 low of 70.85 support zone with cushion) and target at 88 (~11% above CMP, R:R ~1:1.9)."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 955.00,
      "new_target": 1100.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Strong +11.25% breakout on Q4 results. Record FY26 PAT, GNPA below 1% for first time. Trail SL to 955 (just below prior day close 906 with buffer, preserves ~-3% from entry). Target 1100 (analyst target 1143, being conservative). R:R 1:3."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 119.00,
      "new_target": 135.00,
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge position, minor drawdown. Setting SL at 119 (below SMA20 121.92 with ATR buffer) and target 135 on continued gold strength. Keep as portfolio hedge given elevated VIX."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1620.00,
      "new_target": 1820.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Up 5.94% today with 2.3x volume. Power theme + summer demand. Trail SL to 1620 (locks in breakeven, just below prior day high 1637). Target 1820 (~7% upside, ahead of Q4 FY26 results catalyst). R:R 1:2.3."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1340.00,
      "new_target": 1520.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "Best Q4 in 9 years (PAT +27%, revenue +23%, volume double-digit). At fresh 52-week high. SL at 1340 (just below breakout level ~1340 and today's low 1382 gives minor buffer; using 1340 to allow gap-fill room). Target 1520 (~8% upside). Strong conviction post-earnings."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 995.00,
      "new_target": 1150.00,
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "Breaking out to 52-week high ahead of Q4 on April 25 (binary event in 2 days). SL at 995 (below April 20 low 984 with buffer). Target 1150 on beat. R:R ~1:3 but binary risk — tight SL required."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 645.00,
      "new_target": 740.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 8,
      "reasoning": "3.7x volume surge with institutional accumulation signal into Q4 FY26 results April 29. Trump tariff exempts generics. SL at 645 (below April 17 low 646). Target 740 (~8% upside). R:R 1:1.5."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 2290.00,
      "new_target": 2480.00,
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "Defensive FMCG position ahead of Q4 on April 28. Nestle's strong print sets high bar. SL at 2290 (below prior day low 2223 with buffer 3.3%). Target 2480 on clean beat."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 385.00,
      "new_target": 435.00,
      "confidence": 0.68,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "Multiple broker top pick. P/E discount to peers, capacity additions, summer demand tailwind. SL at 385 (below SMA20 ~378 with cushion), target 435 (within analyst range 400-460). R:R 1:1.6."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 198.00,
      "new_target": 240.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "Strong momentum +76% YoY into Q4 earnings April 29. Near 52-week high. SL at 198 (below prior day close 200.83). Target 240 on earnings beat + summer demand. Shooting star yesterday warrants tighter SL."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 74.00,
      "reasoning": "Thesis intact post Q4 beat; SL set below recent support."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 955.00,
      "reasoning": "Lock in profit after +11% surge; hold for further upside to 1100."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 119.00,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge maintained with SL below SMA20."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1620.00,
      "reasoning": "SL trailed to near breakeven locking in downside protection."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1340.00,
      "reasoning": "Best Q4 in 9 years; riding momentum to 1520."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 995.00,
      "reasoning": "Hold into Q4 April 25 with tight SL below recent support."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 645.00,
      "reasoning": "Institutional accumulation signal pre-earnings."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 2290.00,
      "reasoning": "Defensive FMCG ahead of Q4; SL contains downside."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 385.00,
      "reasoning": "Street favorite for summer demand; hold to Q4."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPOWER",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 198.00,
      "reasoning": "Shooting star on top warrants tight SL; hold for Q4 catalyst."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "ADANIENSOL Q4 results TODAY — binary event, wait for print before considering entry. AUROPHARMA buyback at 1475 provides floor but CMP 1432 with limited remaining deployable capital makes it a pass today. PIRAMALFIN — wait for April 27 board meeting. DATAPATTNS, DEEPAKNTR, ELECON — avoid chasing parabolic +13-18% single-day moves without confirmed catalysts. TRITURBINE, CESC, IEX — volume divergences interesting but need follow-through. DRREDDY — Brazil ANVISA rejection is a real negative; skip.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 79% deployed (near the 80% cap) — zero remaining capacity for new entries. Critical gap identified: NONE of the 10 existing positions had active stop-losses. This tick focused entirely on setting SLs and targets on every holding, which is correctly the priority before any new adds. Sector concentration check: Power cluster (TORNTPOWER + NTPC + ADANIPOWER) = ~5.1% + 5.0% + 4.9% = ~15% of capital — within cluster limit but at ceiling, no more power additions. Pharma (GRANULES + NESTLEIND is FMCG): GRANULES ~4.8% + no other pharma held, room there but no capacity. Financials: MAHABANK + PNBHOUSING + AUBANK = ~9.8% + 7.9% + 18.4% = ~36% — at sector cap, NO additions. Daily loss limit barely touched. Will reassess tomorrow after today's earnings prints (ADANIENSOL, AUBANK) trigger price action."
}
